'''Inat Prime''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Quiberon sector/Legends|Quiberon sector]]. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] had microscopic subdermal trackers placed on [[Rivo Xarran]] on Inat Prime.
